inputDescription: Paste PEM content, base64 DER, or import a certificate/public-key file.
inputPlaceholder: Paste a PEM certificate, PEM public key, or base64 DER data…
inputHint: Supports X.509 CERTIFICATE and PUBLIC KEY PEM blocks plus DER/base64 DER certificate or SPKI public-key data.
selectedFileHint: Selected file: {name}. Import another file or clear the input to return to pasted text.
resultsDescription: Parsing runs locally; copy fingerprints or structured JSON for comparison and troubleshooting.
resultsEmptyDescription: Paste or import a certificate or public key to inspect its fields.
loadingDescription: Reading the certificate structure and computing fingerprints.
invalidInput: Unrecognized input format. Provide PEM, DER, or base64 DER data.
invalidPem: No valid PEM blocks were found.
parseFailed: Unable to parse as an X.509 certificate or SPKI public key.
readFileError: Could not read the selected file.
